problem_statement: Real Estate Prices, Property Features, and Market Data. A real estate analyst wants to build and evaluate linear regression models to understand property pricing drivers.
question: Fit an OLS linear regression of sale_price on all numeric features (sqft, bedrooms, bathrooms, year_built, lot_acres, garage_spaces, renovated, distance_miles, months_listed) using the train split — do NOT include neighborhood. Compute the mean residual (actual minus predicted) for each neighborhood in the training data. Which neighborhood does the model most underprice on average? Report the neighborhood name.
agent_instructions: The data source is a directory of CSV files. Inspect only the files needed for the question and compute the answer directly in notebook code. Use sklearn LinearRegression.
